codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract: loader configures pdfjs-dist v5 worker source, validates MIME type and 50MB limit before loading, wires optional password callback through loadingTask.onPassword, returns { pdf, numPages }, and provides destroyPDF cleanup helper. Tests cover required validation and loader API behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The engine-worker skill does not mention that importing pdfjs-dist in Vitest/jsdom requires mocking due to missing DOMMatrix, which caused avoidable iteration during implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl (session 79a2e798-1341-4fd0-a47d-6c145d603836) shows explicit failure analysis: "pdfjs-dist 5.x needs DOMMatrix which isn't available in jsdom" and subsequent test refactor to mock pdfjs-dist; handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges repeats this gap.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared library docs do not currently capture the jsdom/pdfjs-dist DOMMatrix limitation and recommended unit-test mocking pattern.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: No DOMMatrix/jsdom-pdfjs guidance found in .factory/library/* (architecture.md, environment.md) or .factory/skills/engine-worker/SKILL.md, while this issue was encountered and documented in the feature transcript/handoff.

summary: Reviewed feature pdf-loader at commit 9a093f3. The feature satisfies its required behavior with no blocking code defects found; review status is pass. Noted a shared-state gap around documenting pdfjs-dist + jsdom mocking requirements.
